creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
>
>This port is not updated on purpose, 1.5.x is development branch.

Oh, sorry, I didn't know that.

>I`m waiting for stable 1.6.x branch, any special reason
>you want to update it ?
>

No, there's no special reason.
The fact is that using the version in ports, some warning are displayed in the 
console and sometimes, comparing directories with a lot of files it seems to 
get stuck.
So I decided to try a newer version patching the one in ports.
Well, the messages on the console are still here (maybe fewer - py-gtk 
problems?) and I had no time/occasion to test it with huge dirs.
Anyway it seems to work and the patch was ready, so I've submitted it.
So, no problem for me to wait for 1.6 if you prefer.

Thanks
Barbara
